[Congressional Bills 109th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[H. Res. 664 Engrossed in House (EH)]


H. Res. 664

                 In the House of Representatives, U.S.,

                                                      February 1, 2006.
    Resolved, That the following named Member be, and that he hereby is, elected 
to the following standing committee of the House of Representatives:
    Committee on House Administration: Mr. Ehlers, Chairman.
    Resolved, That the following named Member be, and that he hereby is, ranked 
as follows on the following standing committee of the House of Representatives:
    Committee on House Administration: Mr. Ney, after Mr. Ehlers.
            Attest:

                                                                          Clerk.
